title: Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling 18 Matching Service Providers 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ALL-OPTIONS ALL-OPTIONS TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential space to talk about pregnancy, parenting, abortion, and adoption. Peer counselors offer judgment-free support at any point before, during, and after pregnancy, regardless of which options the caller is considering. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-10pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-3pm Email (888) 493-0092 Visit Website More Details BOYS & GIRLS AID SUPPORTIVE ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides all-options counseling for those facing unplanned pregnancy. Work with a trained and unbiased pregnancy counselor to explore options for parenting, adoption and abortion. When adoption is chosen, individuals may select the family and degree of openness they are most comfortable with. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Individuals facing an unintended pregnancy Hours: Hotline, texting, and adoption calls: 24 hours / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 222-9661 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL ABORTION HOTLINE NATIONAL ABORTION FEDERATION HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Abortion Hotline that provides callers with information, confidential consultation, and referrals to providers that offer abortion care. Services include case management and limited financial assistance. PO Box 100 Annapolis Junction, MD 20701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-4pm, Saturday-Sunday 5am-1pm Summer Hours: Closed Fridays for the month of August Closed on the following dates: September 1, October 13, November 27-28 and December 24- January 6 Email (800) 772-9100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetric and gynecological services. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES EUGENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports pregnant women and couples in making informed decisions about pregnancy options, including parenting, abortion, and adoption. Open adoptions offer ongoing visits and lifelong services. 1590 Willamette Street Suite 217 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Expectant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. On-call counselor available evenings and weekends for time-sensitive pregnancy options counseling and client work. Email (541) 343-4825 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports pregnant women and couples in making informed decisions about pregnancy options, including parenting, abortion, and adoption. Open adoptions offer ongoing visits and lifelong services. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Expectant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. On-call counselor available evenings and weekends for time-sensitive pregnancy options counseling and client work. Email (503) 226-4870 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks, surgical abortion not offered at this location. 12220 SW 1st Street Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 11am-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEND HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks and surgical abortion up to 13 weeks and 6 days. 3825 Wolverine Street NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 9am-5pm, Tuesday 11am-7pm, Wednesday noon-7pm, Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of sexual and reproductive health care services, including birth control, emergency contraception (morning after pill), annual gynecological exams, PAP tests, colposcopy and LEEP procedures, breast exams, LGBTQ2+ services, Gender Affirming Hormone Therapy (GAHT), sexually transmitted disease (STD) testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, pregnancy testing and options information. Provides a medication based abortion (up to 10 weeks) and surgical abortion (up to 13 weeks + 6 days). 3579 Franklin Boulevard Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Varies by service. HPV immunizations available for age 18 and younger. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday 9:30am-6pm, Thursday/Friday 10:30am-6pm (541) 344-9411 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH YAMHILL NEWBERG CLINIC PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health services provided by a nurse or nurse practitioner. Services include annual gynecological checkups (pap smears, breast and pelvic exams), testing and treatment of sexually transmitted infections (STIs) for men and women, pregnancy testing and options counseling for pregnant women, health education (including breast self-exam and testicular self-exam instruction), child/adult immunizations, and maternal and child health care. 2318 N Portland Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOYS & GIRLS AID SUPPORTIVE ADOPTION OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES EUGENE OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH PLANNED PARENTHOOD OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES PLANNED PARENTHOOD OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES
